description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in Enthrallwebe ePhotos 2.2 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary SQL commands via the (1) CAT_ID parameter in (a) subphotos.asp and (b) subLevel2.asp, the (2) AL_ID parameter in (c) photo.asp, and the (3) SUB_ID parameter in (d) subLevel2.asp.
